Container.Name: ScrapeGoat
Container.Overview: ScrapeGoat is a web app that scrapes websites and answers questions about them using a local LLM via Ollama. Provides a Gradio web UI accessible on the configured port. The image is published to GitHub Container Registry and will be pulled automatically when you start the container.
Container.Requires: Ollama container (e.g., ollama/ollama) must be running and accessible at the configured OLLAMA_HOST URL. Optionally, a SearXNG container (searxng/searxng) provides an improved web scraping backend via the SEARXNG_HOST variable. Optionally, an Automatic1111 (stable-diffusion-webui) container can be used for image generation via A1111_HOST / A1111_PORT (A1111 must be started with --api).

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Gradio web interface.

Config.Name: Ollama Host
Config.Description: URL of the Ollama API. Use the container name if Ollama runs on the same Docker network (e.g. http://ollama:11434), or the host IP for host-network setups (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:11434).

Config.Name: Ollama Model
Config.Description: The Ollama model to use for answering questions. The model must already be pulled inside your Ollama container (run: docker exec -it ollama ollama pull qwen:0.5b).

Config.Name: Ollama Vision Model
Config.Description: (Optional) The Ollama model to use for image analysis. Must support multimodal input (e.g. llava). Pull it first: docker exec -it ollama ollama pull llava. Leave blank to disable image analysis.

Config.Name: Gradio Port (env)
Config.Description: Internal Gradio server port. Change only if you need a non-default port inside the container.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: (Optional) Telegram Bot API token. Only required when running the Telegram bot (ScrapeGoat.py) instead of the Gradio app.

Config.Name: WhisperLive Host
Config.Description: (Optional) URL of a running WhisperLive service for GPU-accelerated speech transcription, e.g. http://whisperlive:9090. Use ghcr.io/collabora/whisperlive-gpu:latest as the WhisperLive container image. Leave empty to disable speech transcription (music analysis still works without it).

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: (Optional) NVIDIA GPU visibility for the container. Set to 'all' (default) to expose all GPUs when the NVIDIA Container Toolkit is installed. Leave empty to disable GPU access when no NVIDIA GPU is present.

Config.Name: NVIDIA Driver Capabilities
Config.Description: (Optional) NVIDIA driver capabilities exposed to the container. Set to 'all' (default) to enable all capabilities. Leave empty when no NVIDIA GPU is present.

Config.Name: SearXNG Host
Config.Description: (Optional) URL of a running SearXNG instance used as the web search/scraping backend, e.g. http://searxng:8080. Use searxng/searxng:latest as the SearXNG container image. Leave empty to fall back to direct proxy scraping.

Config.Name: A1111 Host
Config.Description: (Optional) Base URL of your Automatic1111 (stable-diffusion-webui) instance (no path). A1111 must be started with --api. Example: http://a1111 or http://192.168.1.50

Config.Name: A1111 Port
Config.Description: (Optional) Port for the A1111 API/web UI (default 7860).

Config.Name: A1111 Default Model
Config.Description: (Optional) Default A1111 checkpoint name to use for generation. Leave blank to use the currently loaded model.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for scraped content database (db.json).

Config.Name: Qdrant Vector Store
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the local Qdrant vector database used for embeddings.
